label: applied probability
evidence: Applied probability's core objects (Markov, distributions, processes) live in Mathlib/Probability; folder is the whole field's formal home, not just pure theory.
verify_note: Folder is probability theory's home (Q5862903 pinned elsewhere); no queueing/actuarial/applied-prob content in Mathlib.

label: set-theoretic topology
evidence: General/point-set topology built on set theory (separation axioms, filters, cardinal invariants) lives across Mathlib/Topology; no tighter dedicated subfolder exists.
verify_note: Folder is topology's home (Q42989/Q621550 pinned elsewhere); Mathlib lacks set-theoretic-topology hallmarks; vague pin.

label: arithmetic combinatorics
evidence: Mathlib/Combinatorics/Additive formalizes additive/arithmetic combinatorics (sumsets, Freiman, Plunnecke-Ruzsa) matching the field's standard scope.
verify_note: Path ok (566 decls: CauchyDavenport, PluenneckeRuzsa, Freiman); superfield pin — exact item Q56313053 not in universe.

label: number theory
evidence: Mathlib/NumberTheory (6306 decls) is the canonical dedicated top-level folder for number theory: primes, Diophantine, L-series, cyclotomic fields, etc.
verify_note: Path ok (6306 decls); spot-check Bernoulli/Bertrand/ClassNumber/Cyclotomic/Dioph; QID label verified upstream.

label: category theory
evidence: Mathlib/CategoryTheory (38455 decls) is the dedicated top-level folder covering the entire field of category theory.
verify_note: Path ok (38455 decls); dedicated top-level folder covering the whole field; QID label verified upstream.

label: descriptive set theory
evidence: Mathlib/SetTheory/Descriptive is a dedicated subfolder (Borel/analytic sets etc.) directly matching this field's scope.
verify_note: Folder holds only Tree.lean (32 decls); Borel/analytic sets live in MeasureTheory/Constructions/Polish; evidence false.

label: homotopical algebra
evidence: Model categories (612 decls) are the standard formal toolkit of homotopical algebra; tighter than the broader AlgebraicTopology folder.
verify_note: Path ok (612 decls); Basic.lean defines Quillen ModelCategory = core of homotopical algebra; QID verified upstream.
